title: Christ Victory over Death (John 20: 1-18)
speaker: Fr Antony Paul
description: The sermon delves into the significance of the Resurrection as a central theme in Christian faith, emphasising that every Sunday is a celebration of this event.

title: Our Hearts and our Treasure
speaker: Fr Moses Gad
description: First seek the kingdom of God! Loosen your bond to the Earthly and invest in the Heavenly. Liberate yourself from the slavery of worldly desires. Fasting is a way to empty yourself from the love of pleasures and allows us to break the chains of bondage.

title: Taming the Passions - Pride
speaker: Fr James Mikhail
description: As Lent comes to an end we learn about numerous controlling of the passions, we start with controlling our stomachs, then our thoughts and emotions, and even our time. Fr James on Palm Sunday as he discusses the last and final passion, pride.

title: The Choices We Make
speaker: Fr Daniel Meleka
description: Everyday we get the opportunity to make choices that will either allow us to draw closer to Jesus, or further away. Tune into Fr Daniel's sermon about the Prodigal Son as he teaches how we can learn to make the choices that will ultimately unite us with Christ!

title: God's Challenge or the Devil's Temptation?
speaker: Fr David Elias
description: Sometimes we think that God leaves us in times of temptation or hardships; however, this is not the case. Tune into Fr David's sermon as he explains how to overcome challenges in our life through the example of Christ's temptation on the mount!

title: Holy Monday - The Fig Tree
speaker: Fr Anthony Morgan
description: Tune in to Fr Anthony as he contemplates on Jesus' encounter with the fig tree

title: Palm Sunday - The Secret of Palm Sunday
speaker: Fr David Milad
description: Tune in to Fr David as he contemplates on the secret of Palm Sunday!

title: Lenten Table E03: Claiming Our Victory in Christ - Temptation Sunday - CYC
speaker: Fr Abraham Fam, Fr Mark Aziz
description:
Temptation! It seems to be all around us! How do we rid of it?!
Tune in to Fr Abraham & Fr Mark discussing the temptation of our Lord in Matthew 4:1-10, & how we can tackle our own temptations particularly through the Lenten Period.

title: The Road To Resurrection: Our Journey Through Lent
speaker: Fr Abraham Fam
description: Are you ready to take this Road Trip to the Resurrection? Tune into Fr Abraham exploring the Pit Stops necessary for our Lenten journey: 1) Heavenly Perpective, 2) Resilience, 3) Metanoia, 4) Mercy, 5) Hope, 6) Illumination & 7) Intentional.

title: The Purpose of the Great Lent
speaker: Fr Youhanna Yanny
description: Listen in to a Sermon by Fr Youhanna Yanny, as he explains the purpose behind the great lent and fasting.

title: Lenten Journey: The Bright Sadness
speaker: Fr Paul Girguis
description:
The Great Lent is a time of repentance, an opportunity to get out of exile and return home like the prodigal son. More than just sacrificing food, we should use this special time of year to rediscover our spiritual life and to repurpose. 
True repentance is a lifestyle, and a way to renew our minds. Fr Paul Guirguis encourages us to have a beneficial and life-changing fast by offering practical steps to soften our hearts so that we may experience the real hunger for God.
"Therefore we were buried with Him through baptism into death, that just as Christ was raised from the dead by the glory of the Father, even so we also should walk in newness of life." - Romans 6:4 NKJV

title: The Great Lent and my Desert Experience
speaker: Fr Kyrillos Ibrahim
description: Tune in as Fr Kyrillos Ibrahim reveals his encounter with God during the great lent. He demonstrates how the Great Lent allows for purification of the soul, surrendering ourselves to God and trusting in God.

title: Keeping Your Eyes on God (and Q&A)
speaker: Fr Antony Paul
description: Tune into this talk and Q&A delivered by Fr Antony Paul for Coptic Orthodox Answers and reflect on the need to keep our eyes on God. Let us recognise God as our first and greatest love, caring for Him over luxurious living and maintaining eye contact with Him, rather than looking down through a secular eye.

title: Lent - Divine Liturgy Sermon
speaker: Fr Daniel Habib
description:
Divine Liturgy sermon at St. John Coptic Orthodox Church, California

On the first Sunday of Lent 2017, Father Daniel Habib gives crucial advice on the best way to start this Holy Fast.

title: Growing Through Lent
speaker: Fr David Milad
description:
Listen in as Fr David Milad discusses how we can get the most out of Lent, improving our spiritual lives through fasting.

From our listener: 
Growing through lent is a talk that brings forward the importance of fasting and how linking Christ with fasting is imperative. Lent is a time of repentance, forgiveness, being virtuous and ultimately relating everything to Christ in our daily life. Leaving our earthly desires behind and putting our main focus in Christ and how to become Christ like in everything that we do. Christ has blessed us with the ultimate gift of fasting, it is a way of becoming closer to Him and truely knowing how amazing our father is. Fasting and praying gives true fulfilment. How lucky are we to be called the children of Jesus Christ the almighty!

title: The Feast of the Cross
speaker: Fr Antony Paul
description: The Cross is one of the most recognisable signs of Christianity. Is it just a symbol or can we use it as a powerful tool? Is the Cross a sign of suffering or victory? Tune in to Father Antony Paul to learn about how we can best utilise the Power of the Cross.

title: A Blessed Lent!
speaker: HE Archbishop Angaelos
description: Tune in with Archbishop Angaelos as he encourages us to give of ourselves during Lent. We are taught about the value of fasting- having a discipline in what we eat, and what we think. Along with fasting there is something more we ought to be taking part of every Lenten season, something that Christ role-modelled Himself-  doing good deeds!

title: True Satisfaction - Lent Journey 2018
speaker: HE Archbishop Angaelos
description: HG Bishop Angaelos explores the concept of attaining 'True Satisfaction' in the context of our personal, spiritual journey throughout Lent, outlining the steps and requirements we must take in this period of fasting and prayer.

title: Why and What Do we Give up in Lent?
speaker: HE Archbishop Angaelos

title: Developing an Intentional Plan for Lent
speaker: HE Archbishop Angaelos
description: His Grace Bishop Angaelos speaks about the importance of preparing oneself mentally and planning ahead to benefit as much as possible spiritually from Lent.

title: Building our Relationship with God During Lent
speaker: HE Archbishop Angaelos
description: The Lent is an important time where followers of Christ dwell on the message of His death and Resurrection and the implications it holds. The mighty force of the Lord's forgiveness is powerful and as we ponder on this notion, the bond with our God grows in strength. Tune in to His Grace Bishop Angaelos as he speaks of the means in which we can find strength in our relationship with God!

title: Giving Our Hearts For Lent
speaker: Fr Andrew Iskander
description: Tune in as Father Andrew Iskander teaches us how to be a loving, selfless and joyful givers.

title: Taking the Holy Days of Lent Seriously
speaker: Fr Daniel Ebrahim
description: In this talk given by Fr Daniel, He gives us tips, advice and practical steps we can take on a daily basis so that we are able to experience and benefit the most from the Holy 50 Days of Lent. Tune into this great talk to learn more

title: Benefiting from Lent
speaker: Fr Daniel Habib
description: Join Father Daniel Habib as he discusses how to benefit from the great lent.

title: A Journey Through Lent
speaker: Fr Daniel Habib
description: How do we spiritually recharge during Lent and Holy week? Tune in as Fr. Daniel Habib takes us through a life changing period of fasting, retreat and contemplation on the final steps of Jesus Christ.

title: Great Lent: A Journey to Heaven
speaker: Fr James Gendi
description:
“Moreover, when you fast, do not be like the hypocrites, with a sad countenance. For they disfigure their faces that they may appear to men to be fasting. Assuredly, I say to you, they have their reward. But you, when you fast, anoint your head and wash your face, so that you do not appear to men to be fasting, but to your Father who is in the secret place; and your Father who sees in secret will reward you openly." - Matthew 6:16-18

Tune in as Fr. James Gendi delivers this sermon on Preparation Sunday, the Sunday before The Holy Great Fast, about the journey of fasting and prayer onwards to the Kingdom of Heaven.

title: Sunday of The Paralytic Man
speaker: Fr Athanasius Iskander
description: On the fifth Sunday of the Great Lent, the Gospel read is The Paralytic Man and is used by Father Athanasius to explain illnesses that are a result of sin and the damaging affects on ones life.

title: The Man Born Blind
speaker: Fr Athanasius Iskander
description:
On the sixth and last sunday of lent, Fr Athanasius contempates the miracle of the man born blind as a symbolism of baptism and as a way for Jesus to manifest himself before the Jews, to see His light and walk in it.

John 9:3 Jesus answered, “Neither this man nor his parents sinned, but that the works of God should be revealed in him’.

title: Are You In Your Father's House
speaker: Fr Athanasius Iskander
description: In this talk given by Fr Athanasius, he talks about the prodigal son and how he left his father's house. He calls upon us to see if we have done the same to our Father and how to come back to His house. Tune into this great talk to learn more

title: How To Fast
speaker: Fr Athanasius Iskander
description: What is the proper way to fast? Find out with Fr Athanasius  Iskander!

title: Wednesday Eve - Are you prepared?
speaker: Fr Mark Basily
description: The parables of the coming age are often taken at face value without a real depth into their true meaning. But if begin to look at their 1st century context, we might just begin to grasp what Christ was really trying to tell us. So then, are you prepared for Christ? Is your heart (door) open for God? Listen closely as Father Mark preaches that God always provides and we are the ones that close the "door"!

title: Do You Want To Be Made Well?
speaker: Fr Joseph Ghattas

title: Approaching God With A Broken Heart
speaker: Fr Yacoub Magdy
description: Father Jacob joins us tonight for boys meeting, to speak about approaching God with a broken heart.

title: Fasting
speaker: Michael Iskander
description: As we begin to fast, it is the perfect time to understand what fasting is really all about! Listen closely as our servant Michael Iskander discusses the importance of fasting and how it changes you as a person.

title: The Path to God
speaker: Fr Daniel Fanous
description:
"The way to God is one, Christ. But the lanes may be many" Fr Daniel Fanous

Getting to heaven is our path to God's Kingdom. This path is like a highway filled with many different lanes and paths. Listen as Father Dan enlightens us on the many mansions in heaven and the different paths everyone around us can take.

title: Faithfulness to the Lord
speaker: Fr Anthony Sharkawy
description: Johnny goes through and talks about Christ’s Love, Devotion to Christ, Faithfulness and Prayer.

title: Help My Unbelief
speaker: HG Bishop Youssef
description: Join Bishop Youssef as he talks about how to overcome our unbelief.

title: Wednesday Eve - Remember That There is a Heaven
speaker: Fr Jonathan Ishak
description: Fr Jonathan reminds us of the reality of heaven and why we should be diligently seeking to enter God's kingdom.

title: How To Benefit From Holy Week
speaker: Fr Augustinos Nada, Fr Mark Basily, Fr Yacoub Magdy
description: A Panel of our priests discuss the best methods to fully IMMERSE ourselves in Holy Week !

title: Do Not Worry
description:
Matthew 6:19-33
Our Lord in this gospel invites us to be free of all worries. But do we accept His invitation?

Tune in as Fr Elijah takes us through the gospel of the Treasures of the Kingdom of Heaven!

title: Temptation Sunday
speaker: Fr David Shehata
description:
"Then Jesus, being filled with the Holy Spirit, returned from the Jordan and was led by the Spirit into the wilderness, being tempted for forty days by the devil.” Luke 4:1-13 

Listen in as Fr. David Shehata provides many insightful and applicable lessons we can learn from the Gospel reading of Temptation Sunday.

title: The Two Lost Sons
speaker: Fr Mark Basily
description:
Luke 15:11-32

This is the greatest short story ever told. Was it just the one son who left his father that was lost or were they both lost? 
Tune in as Fr Mark takes us through the Gospel of the Prodigal Son and how important it is for us to maintain our child/ father relationship with our heavenly Lord.

title: The Paralytic Man
speaker: Fr Mark Basily
description:
“When Jesus saw him lying there, and knew that he already had been in that condition a long time, He said to him, “Do you want to be made well?”” John 5:6

Have you ever wondered why Jesus asks the paralytic if he wants to be made well? Don’t we all want to be made well? And why Jesus chose this particular man to heal instead of the rest? Listen in as Fr Mark Basily answers all our questions on this beautiful gospel of the paralytic man.

title: Friday Eve - What is the meaning of Judas' kiss?
speaker: Fr Mark Basily
description: Fr Mark discusses what is the meaning of Judas' kiss.

title: True Fasting
speaker: Fr Mark Basily
description:
Matthew 6:1-18

“But you, when you fast, anoint your head and wash your face, so that you do not appear to men to be fasting, but to your Father who is in the secret place; and your Father who sees in secret will reward you openly."

Listen in as Fr. Mark Basily explains how we should conduct ourselves while fasting, as we begin the Holy Lent as well as the secrecy involved when we do a charitable deed.

title: Temptations
speaker: Fr Daniel Fanous
description:
"And when He had fasted forty days and forty nights, afterward He was hungry" Matthew 4:2

A POWERFUL sermon given by Fr. Daniel on how temptations can reveal to us who we are at our very base and the way to overcome them.

Make sure you have a listen!

title: How fasting can make prayer effective
speaker: Fr Yacoub Magdy
description:
What does abstaining from foods have to do with prayer ?
How can fasting produce a prayer that is acceptable before to God ?
Listen in to this insightful talk by our beloved Fr Yacoub about how to benefit from the Holy Lent.

title: Thursday Eve - The Power of Prayer
speaker: Adel Magdy

title: Friday Eve - What is the meaning of Judas' kiss?
speaker: Fr Mark Basily
description: Fr Mark discusses what is the meaning of Judas' kiss.

title: Regaining Control By Fasting
speaker: Fr Daniel Fanous
description:
"We don't fast to suffer, we fast to stop suffering. We don't to give up something, we fast to regain control over ourselves"

A very much needed talk given by Fr. Daniel about the importance of fasting and how we should approach the holy days of the Great Lent.

GET PUMPED!

title: Good Friday - Reaching Paradise
speaker: Deacon Magdy Kilada
description: How do I get to heaven? Deacon Magdy provides the answer to a question we all should ask ourselves.

title: Friday Eve - What is the meaning of Judas' kiss?
speaker: Fr Mark Basily
description: Fr Mark discusses what is the meaning of Judas' kiss.

title: Regaining Control By Fasting
speaker: Fr Daniel Fanous
description:
"We don't fast to suffer, we fast to stop suffering. We don't to give up something, we fast to regain control over ourselves"

A very much needed talk given by Fr. Daniel about the importance of fasting and how we should approach the holy days of the Great Lent.
